author: Daniel Wilks
content: I still cannot find the info I want on any of these stake pool sites.  Right now. I have 50K USD to invest in a ADA staking pool.  THe problem I see is that the APR is only 6 to 7% annually which isnt worth my time honestly.  How will putting my money in a pool, get me better dividends?

author: Peter
content:
Hi

The Cardano staking protocol with yield you 5.5% pa compounding every 5 days. That's built into Cardano. With luck, a pool can get you slightly more or slightly less but overall will average out to that golden 5.5%.

You can use the calculator http://cardanode.com.au/cardano-staking-calculator-rewards-ada/ to work out roughly what you'll get over a year. Not much else will get you a higher return on ADA. It's a long game.

author: Manuel
content: I recommend you take that 50K and put it all into a  leveraged trade. Best option would be 50x (because its 50k) or more. Then you will see your lambo fast. Or not, it depends on the day i guess. Does not need much of your precious time, i swear. :)

author: Peter
content: LOL, I'll approve that comment but I just have to say that none of this is financial advice. Please seek consultation from a tax accountant and financial advisor. Speculating in cryptocurrencies is risky. Don't invest more than you can lose. Listen to the theme song.
